description_long: This is a dark wooden bookshelf with a rectangular frame and four evenly spaced horizontal shelves, providing five open compartments for storage or display. The wood has a rich, deep brown finish with a slightly weathered, matte appearance, giving it a rustic yet sturdy look. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front is completely open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The construction appears robust, with thick panels and no visible fasteners or decorative elements. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its utilitarian design. This type of shelving unit is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, libraries, garages, or residential spaces for organizing books, tools, or other items.
description: A dark brown, open wooden bookshelf with four shelves and a solid, rectangular frame. The design is simple, sturdy, and utilitarian, with no doors or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full depth of the bookshelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid back panel with a uniform wood finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a plain, solid panel.
